output.monitoring_recommendation: Monitor first 3 runs in #ae-alerts. Watch for: affiliate row count dropping to 0 (source freshness issue), revenue_usd anomalies, grain violations (duplicate action_id). The triage workflow will auto-investigate if tests fail.

decision_log.decision: transform_acquisition__hourly is the correct DAG — tags match, schedule aligns with incremental staging
decision_log.rationale: DBT_INVOCATIONS shows hourly runs for acquisition staging models; affiliate fits this pattern
alternatives_considered: transform_acquisition__daily — but staging is incremental hourly

tool_calls.input: SELECT job_name, COUNT(*) FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_INVOCATIONS WHERE job_name ILIKE '%acquisition%hourly%' GROUP BY 1
